briefs.title: BC Ferry Terminal Property Tax Assessments Updated for 2026 Taxation Year
briefs.summary: BC updated the rules for how certain BC Ferries terminal properties are valued for property tax purposes. The change shifts the assessment reference date from December 31, 2024 (used for 2025 taxes) to December 31, 2025 (used for 2026 taxes), and updates the official property values listed in the schedules for terminals across BC's coastal ferry network.
